label: Checkly
description: Synthetic monitoring, API monitoring, and end-to-end Playwright testing powered by Checkly.

form.title: Connect Checkly
form.subtitle: Paste your Checkly API key and account ID to give Anton access to your monitors, checks, and results.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a Checkly API key along with your account ID. Generated in seconds from Account Settings — no OAuth flow required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect via Checkly API Key

### 1. Get your API key

1. Log in to [app.checklyhq.com](https://app.checklyhq.com).
2. Click your avatar or username in the bottom-left corner to open **Account Settings**.
3. Navigate to **API Keys** (or directly visit `app.checklyhq.com/account/api-keys`).
4. Click **Create API Key**, give it a descriptive name like `Anton`, and click **Create**.
5. Copy the key immediately — it is shown only once.

### 2. Find your Account ID

1. While still in **Account Settings**, select the **General** tab.
2. Your **Account ID** is listed near the top of the page (a short alphanumeric string).
3. Copy it.

### 3. Paste into Anton

Paste both values into the fields below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- API keys are tied to the account that created them. If you have multiple Checkly accounts (e.g. different orgs), make sure you copy from the right one.
- Checkly does not currently support scoped API keys — the key grants full read/write access to the account.
- If you suspect a key was exposed, delete it from the API Keys page and create a new one.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Generated at app.checklyhq.com → Account Settings → API Keys. Shown only once — copy it before closing the dialog.

fields.name: account_id
fields.label: Account ID
fields.description: Found in app.checklyhq.com → Account Settings → General. Required to scope API requests to your account.
